_note: On-site daily log for ZABAL Gamez. Newest day first. Mirrors the Year of the ZABAL newsletter; add one entry per build day.

updates.title: ZABAL Gamez on Farcaster Batches
updates.body: Day 3. I shared ZABAL Gamez on GM Farcaster's Farcaster Batches, on stage with Empire Builder, Defense of the Agents, Booster, and Celebration Hub - what we are building and how the ecosystem connects. Cassie's Farcaster protocol session moved to next week.
updates.mindful: Let your life be transformed. The agreement: Don't Make Assumptions. When you stop making assumptions, your word becomes impeccable and your life is completely transformed.

updates.title: Ohnahji opens the creator track
updates.body: Ohnahji on his journey in live streaming - how to start and grow your own stream. The first creator-track session of the season.

updates.title: Season 1 begins - yerbearserker and Bonfire
updates.body: Insert Coin. yerbearserker opened on Empire Builder - leaderboards, Empires, and the message to build the foundation before you rush. Then Joshua and Plat0x walked through Bonfire and the ZABAL Bonfire bot. Two live builds, a strong first day.
